title: Big Bazaar is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Big Bazaar is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Big Bazaar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Big Bazaar:
Big Bazaar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar!
